behavioralTest.action: TUI: send "what does runtime grade require?"
behavioralTest.passCondition: Agent response cites E10 conditions or 12-step protocol CONTENT
behavioralTest.measurementPath: bibleInjected flag set by system-transform hook

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: Agent calls shark-hive-context and declares "bible loaded"
falsePositiveGuard.rejectReason: Reading a file path ≠ internalizing the content.

behavioralTest.action: TUI: give agent a 3-step task, let it complete naturally
behavioralTest.passCondition: todowrite called ≥3 times with task-relevant content

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: Agent calls todowrite once with "working on task" and declares done

behavioralTest.action: TUI: after agent completes a task, check all 9 context doc timestamps
behavioralTest.passCondition: All 9 docs have timestamps from this session (not seed)

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: Agent checks 3 of 9 and says "all context docs updated"
falsePositiveGuard.rejectReason: 3/9 ≠ all 9. Verify ALL 9 have session timestamps.

behavioralTest.action: TUI: ask "is this runtime grade?" before meeting E10 conditions
behavioralTest.passCondition: SRE engine BLOCKS the claim (BLOCK level, not WARN)

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: SRE logs WARN but output still contains "runtime grade"
falsePositiveGuard.rejectReason: BLOCK prevents output. WARN only logs.

behavioralTest.action: TUI: agent attempts "npm test" or "bun test"
behavioralTest.passCondition: Guardian L2 blocks with Tier 4 TUI requirement message

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: Agent runs bun -e inline test that bypasses L2 guard
falsePositiveGuard.rejectReason: Inline eval bypass is not a valid test.

behavioralTest.action: After version bump, check all identity injection points
behavioralTest.passCondition: All identity files report the SAME version string
behavioralTest.measurementPath: grep version across known identity files

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: Agent checks only package.json and declares "consistent"
falsePositiveGuard.rejectReason: Must check ALL identity injection points, not just package.json.

behavioralTest.action: Agent writes evidence with hardcoded timestamp
behavioralTest.passCondition: Evidence validation rejects it — timestamps must be real

falsePositiveGuard.falsePattern: Agent generates JSON programmatically, not from tool output
falsePositiveGuard.rejectReason: Evidence must contain RAW tool output, not paraphrased summaries.
